title: Account Note Frontmatter
description: Validation contract for the YAML frontmatter of one note per account in 91_finance/Accounts/. Interpretation metadata only — never per-transaction data.

account_id.description: Stable identifier; should match account_id used in the CSVs.

account_type.description: e.g. checking, savings, credit_card, brokerage, roth_ira, rollover_ira, trust, mortgage, hsa.

tax_treatment.description: Drives tax-aware advice. roth=tax_free, traditional/rollover=tax_deferred, brokerage=taxable.

source_priority.description: Which source wins for this account when manual and linked both have it. Empower/Pershing accounts use manual_statement; everything else linked.

include_in_networth.description: Set false to exclude from net-worth/allocation rollups (e.g. an account tracked for reference only).

owner.description: Household role / owner, e.g. Jesus, LeAndra, joint, trust.
